title: CrossArms
description: Expand your crossbow weaponary! Adds new enchantments for crossbows
body:
## CrossArms

**CrossArms** is a datapack that expands the crossbow into a full weapon platform.  
It adds new enchantments, reworks Multishot, introduces advanced projectile mechanics, and allows crossbows to function as automatic weapons, shotguns, high-velocity rifles, and explosive launchers.

Some enchantments are intentionally incompatible to prevent extreme stacking and to preserve distinct weapon roles.

---

## New Enchantments

### Capacity (I–IV)
Allows a crossbow to store multiple arrows per charge, turning it into a multi-round weapon.

- Increases maximum loaded arrows to 4 / 8 / 12 / 16
- Removes the need to reload after every shot
- Works only with regular arrows; other projectiles charge normally
- Increases crossbow charge time
- **Incompatible with:** Multishot, Acceleration, Bombard, Frenzy

### Acceleration (I–V)
Greatly increases projectile speed, effectively turning the crossbow into a high-velocity weapon.

- Increases projectile speed by 2× / 3× / 4× / 5× / 6×
- Faster projectiles fly farther and deal more damage
- **Incompatible with:** Quick Charge, Capacity, Bombard, Frenzy


### Zero Drop
Disables projectile gravity while sufficient velocity is maintained.

- Greatly improves vertical accuracy
- Disables critical hits
- **Incompatible with:** Piercing, Bombard, Multishot


### Ricochet (I–IV)
Allows arrows to bounce off blocks.

- Each level grants +1 additional bounce
- Bounces will not occur if projectile speed is too low
- Each bounce reduces arrow speed
- **Incompatible with:** Piercing, Bombard, Deflector

### Deflector
Turns arrows into projectile reflectors.

- Fired arrows can reflect other projectiles
- Reflected projectiles copy the Deflector arrow’s speed and direction
- Cannot reflect other Deflector arrows
- Compatible with Acceleration
- **Incompatible with:** Piercing, Quick Charge, Ricochet, Bombard, Frenzy

### Recycling (I–III)
Allows partial recovery of ammunition after hitting a target.

- 25% / 50% / 75% chance to return the arrow to the shooter
- Works only with regular arrows
- **Incompatible with:** Multishot

### Bombard
Converts the crossbow into a true explosive weapon.

- Direct hits cause immediate explosions
- Explosions destroy blocks similarly to TNT
- Hitting a block spawns ignited TNT that explodes after 1 second
- Each shot consumes **15 durability instead of 1**
- Increases crossbow charge time
- **Incompatible with:** Multishot, Piercing, Capacity, Acceleration, Zero Drop, Ricochet, Deflector, Frenzy

### Frenzy
Turns the crossbow into a minigun-like weapon.

- Automatically feeds normal arrows from the inventory
- Introduces a heat mechanic
- Auto-loading stops when the crossbow reaches 1 durability
- Once at 1 durability, the crossbow cannot be manually loaded
- Designed for sustained fire by holding right-click
- **Incompatible with:** Multishot, Piercing, Quick Charge, Capacity, Acceleration, Deflector, Bombard

**Heat:**  
Heat is applied to the player, not the weapon, and persists even if the weapon is dropped.
- Shooting with Frenzy increases heat
- Heat gradually decreases over time
- Higher heat increases Frenzy damage
- At minimal heat, Frenzy damage is reduced

Heat thresholds:
- Level 3 (red): Player begins taking fire damage (can be prevented with Fire Resistance)
- Level 5 (black): Continuing to fire will break the crossbow (down to 2 durability, allowing one final shot before becoming unusable until repaired)

Level 3 and Level 5 transitions are signaled on shot, allowing time to stop firing.

---

## Changed

### Multishot
Reworked to further embrace its shotgun role.

- Now has 3 levels instead of 1
- Each level adds 2 additional projectiles (7 at level III)
- Horizontal spread increases with each level
- At level I, the spread is lower than in vanilla
- Added **Neighboring Bonus** to fired arrows
- **Incompatible with:** Capacity, Recycling, Bombard, Zero Drop, Frenzy

**Neighboring Bonus:**  
When multiple Multishot projectiles are close to each other, they increase each other’s damage.  
This significantly boosts short-range effectiveness.  
Only one arrow can register a true hit, while others may bounce off, penetrate, or be removed.  
Effective range is roughly 3 blocks and may vary due to natural spread.

### Piercing
Now arrows shot with the enchantment leave a particle trail. 

---

## Crossbow Skins

CrossArms also adds cosmetic crossbow skins.

- Applied via the **Smithing Table**
- Purely cosmetic — no gameplay advantages
- Default appearance can be restored with a stick
- Includes 11 material variants (Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite etc.)
- Unlock the **"Locked and Loaded"** advancement by collecting all skins

![Crafting a crossbow skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed206e8cc688fc51bc717377c1da3569d1396b2c.png)
![All of crossbow skins with their materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f16fbf67cfb25429fc01baad60cf72faa73004c3.png)

⚠ If installed as a datapack, CrossArms must also be installed as a resource pack to display skins correctly.
